question: none of them, i ask about the 369 spare system, and i mention im a left handed, in case that makes any difference
content:
The 3-6-9 spare system is a method for adjusting your foot positioning on the approach.
It uses your ZERO POSITION and 4th arrow as target and reference point.
For spares on the right, move your feet left.
For spares on the left, move your feet right.
Adjustments are typically 3, 6, or 9 boards.
This system works for all bowlers.
